name: HYUUGA RYU: JYUUKEN OUGI - IGEKI HISSATSU (HYUUGA STYLE: GENTLE FIST SECRET SKILL - ONE-HIT KILL)

description.value:
Type: Taijutsu (Strike)

Rank: 9 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost: *

Learn DC: 24 | Successes: 5

Perform: 12 | Perform DC: 26

Components: C, Mas, Mob

You make a single Jyuuken attack against the target, and force a large amount of your own Chakra into the target's Chakra coils system.

The target's body attempts to expel it through their tenketsu forcefully. The attack's Chakra cost and effect is based entirely upon how many tenketsu damage the target has taken, (as shown in the table below). The target will be healed of 4d8 tenketsu damage as the Chakra blasts them open forcefully.

| Tenketsu Damage | Cost | Effect |
|-------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 9 or less | 4 | 3d6 nonlethal damage |
| 10-50 | 12 | 7d6 damage; 1d6 Chakra coils damage |
| 51-99 | 14 | 9d6 damage; 1d8 Chakra coils damage |
| 100-199 | 16 | 12d6 damage; 1d10 Chakra coils damage |
| 200-359 | 18 | 15d6 damage; 1d12 Chakra coils damage |
| 360 | 20 | 20d6 damage; 3d8 Chakra coils damage |
| 361 | 26 | Save vs death. If saved, take damage as 360 tenketsu damage (above) |
